[1]> vp migration # migration should fail because pnpm version is not supported
┌  Vite+ Migration
│
●  pnpm@<semver> installing...
│
●  pnpm@<semver> installed
│
■  ❌ pnpm@<semver> is not supported by migration, please upgrade pnpm to >=9.5.0 first
└  The project is not supported by migration


> cat package.json # check package.json is not updated
{
  "devDependencies": {
    "vite": "^7.0.0"
  },
  "packageManager": "pnpm@<semver>"
}
